user_message:
Run a Company Network Multiplicity vigilance assessment for the following actor.

ACTOR:
- Type: PHYSIQUE            # PHYSIQUE or MORALE
- Full name: Xavier Niel
- Date of birth (if PP): 1967-08-25
- City / country of activity: France
- Known SIREN / registry id: N/A
- Known company / activity context: Iliad / Free founder, NJJ Holding

OPTIONAL CONTEXT:
- Additional context: Wrapper smoke test
- Analysis date: 2026-04-27

Apply the methodology defined in your system instructions and return JSON only.

risk_assessment.summary: Xavier Niel (DOB 25 August 1967) is a confirmed French billionaire entrepreneur with primary mandate as founder and majority shareholder (70.6%) of Iliad Group (Free brand), established 1999. Network analysis identifies one dominant confirmed company (Iliad) with secondary investments in Kima Ventures (2010), 42 coding schools (2013), Kyutai AI lab (2023), and co-ownership of Le Monde (2010). No shell indicators, no proceedings, no interdictions, no criminal convictions detected in available sources. Sector coherence maintained across telecommunications, venture capital, and technology education. No multiplicity red flags or lifecycle anomalies identified.
recommended_actions: Obtain official INPI/RNE extracts confirming all mandates and shareholdings for Xavier Niel (DOB 25/08/1967) to establish complete mandate history and verify NJJ Holding structure.
Cross-reference Iliad Group BODACC filings to confirm current shareholding structure and any historical proceedings.
Verify beneficial ownership chain for Kima Ventures, 42 schools, Kyutai, and Le Monde co-ownership through official registries.
Confirm no interdictions de gérer, faillites personnelles, or criminal convictions via French judicial databases (CASIER, INFOGREFFE).

known_limits: NJJ Holding mentioned in user context but not confirmed in search results; official registry verification required.
Exact shareholding percentages and legal structure of Kima Ventures, 42, Kyutai, and Le Monde co-ownership not fully detailed in sources; aggregator cross-reference recommended.
No BODACC proceedings data provided; judicial status verification required.
Search results do not include complete historical mandate list or address history; full INPI extract needed for comprehensive network mapping.
